overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a misty wetland marsh toward a distant Japanese castle. The scene features overcast stormy weather with a distinctive teal color grade, transitioning from shallow water to grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow wetland with distant castle view

agents.ego_description: samurai character wading through shallow water toward a distant white castle

entered.detail: multi-tiered white traditional Japanese castle visible through the mist
hazy mountain range forming the backdrop
leafless trees scattered across the wetland
calm reflective water covering the ground surface
large mossy rock outcrop on the left bank

segments.scene_description: The character walks through shallow wetland water toward a distant white Japanese castle. The overcast sky casts a teal-green hue over the marshy landscape, with dead trees and distant mountains framing the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy marshland with mixed water pools

events.description: ground transitions from shallow water to grassy marshland
text overlay 'TSUSHIMA WILD TALES' appears briefly at bottom of screen

agents.ego_description: continuing through tall marsh grass with occasional shallow water patches

entered.detail: tall green grass and reeds replacing open water
simple wooden post fence emerging in the distance

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from open water to grassy marshland as the character continues forward. The castle moves to the right periphery while a wooden fence structure becomes visible ahead. Brief text appears on screen indicating the game quest type.

events.description: approaching wooden fence structure standing in shallow water

agents.ego_description: walking through mixed grass and water toward wooden posts

entered.detail: young green trees lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a simple wooden fence structure standing in the shallow water. The castle fades from view into the mist while the landscape opens up to reveal more distant mountains and scattered trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a teal-hued wetland that shifts from open shallow waters to a grassy marshland. It begins with the character wading through water toward a distant white Japanese castle framed by dead trees and mountains under an overcast sky. As the character advances, the terrain transitions into grassy marshland, causing the castle to drift toward the right periphery while a wooden fence structure emerges ahead. The scene then opens further to reveal scattered trees and distant mountains as the character approaches the fence, with the castle finally fading into the thick mist.
